stemHtml: In a multi-crew aircraft, there is an indication difference of more than 5 kts between the pilots airspeed indicators (ASIs), does the crew need to take any action?

options.a: No, the lower airspeed is the most accurate.
options.c: No, the crew should reset the Air Data Computer (ADC).
options.d: Yes, the crew can cross-check groundspeed using the GNSS.
